evals.prompt: Let's capture what we learned from this session.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads recent git log to gather session context, proposes learnings one at a time waiting for approval on each, appends accepted entries to learnings.md (does not overwrite), and commits the result.
expectations: Agent reads recent git log to understand what happened in the session
Agent proposes learnings one at a time, not all at once
Agent waits for user approval on each proposed learning
Agent appends entries to learnings.md — does NOT overwrite existing content
Agent commits the updated learnings.md to git

evals.expected_output: Agent detects that .aria/ directory does not exist, tells the user to run aria:setup first, and STOPS without creating .aria/ or learnings.md.
expectations: Agent checks for .aria/learnings.md and detects it is missing
Agent tells the user to run aria:setup first
Agent STOPS — does NOT proceed with capturing learnings

evals.expected_output: Agent reads existing learnings.md before proposing new entries, detects that some topics are already captured, skips duplicates, and only proposes genuinely new insights.
expectations: Agent reads existing learnings.md content before proposing anything
Agent does NOT propose a learning that duplicates a topic already in learnings.md
Agent skips or filters out already-captured topics
Agent proposes only new, non-duplicate insights
